Good, commit done. Now push the workspace repo to GitHub, and sync the other important repos too.

arguments.command:
# Check for uncommitted changes across key repos and sync them
repos=(
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw"
  "/Users/landonking/.agents"
  "/Users/landonking/Desktop/landon/ai_final"
  "/Users/landonking/Desktop/landon/king-ai-v2"
  "/Users/landonking/Desktop/landon/king-ai-studio"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-alpha-manager"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-gamma-manager"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-general-worker"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-product-worker"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-marketing-worker"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-infra-worker"
  "/Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace-legal-worker"
)

for repo in "${repos[@]}"; do
  if [ -d "$repo/.git" ]; then
    changes=$(cd "$repo" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    remotes=$(cd "$repo" && git remote 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ')
    branch=$(cd "$repo" && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)
    echo "$repo | branch=$branch | changes=$changes | remotes=$remotes"
  fi
done
